zh.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly是Murtogh OKelly的女兒，於1375年出生在愛爾蘭。她和Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde至少有1個女兒。她去世於1396年在她的家鄉享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly是Murtogh OKelly的女儿，于1375年出生在爱尔兰。她和Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde至少有1个女儿。她去世于1396年在她的家乡享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Kelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Aileen, John Patrick, Siobhan, Liam, Brigid, Donovan, Eamon, Parnell, Aidan, Clancy.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, or, in some areas, Mac Ceallaigh ‘descendant (or son) of Ceallach’, an ancient Irish personal name, originally a byname meaning ‘bright-headed’, later understood as ‘frequenting churches’ (Irish ceall). There are several early Irish saints who bore this name. Kelly is now the most common of all surnames in Ireland.

Scottish: habitational name from either the lands of Kelly, near Arbroath (Angus), Kellie in Carnbee (Fife), or Kelly in Methlick (Aberdeenshire). Each of these placenames is from Pictish celli or Gaelic coille ‘wood’ + the placename forming suffix -in. Alternatively, from the lands of Kelloe in the barony of Hume (Berwickshire), whose name is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Kelley
meanings: Irish (Offaly) and English: variant of   Kelly  .

variants.name: Kilkelly
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Ceallaigh ‘son of the devotee of (Saint) Ceallach’ (see Kelly ).

variants.name: Killeen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donovan, Kieran, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cillín ‘descendant of Cillín’, a pet form of the personal name Ceallach (see Kelly ). The name was borne by various early Irish saints, including the leader of a 7th-century mission to Franconia and Thuringia, hence the popularity of the personal name Kilian in medieval central Europe.

variants.name: Kellis
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name. Compare   Kellison  .
Greek: descriptive nickname for a bald man, from kelis ‘bald’, a word of Turkish origin (from kel ‘bald’).
History: As a surname of Scottish origin, this has been established in NC since the 18th century.

variants.name: Kellison
meanings: Scottish: patronymic based on   Kelly   as a personal name.

en.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly was born in 1375, in Ireland as the daughter of Murtogh OKelly. She had at least 1 daughter with Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. She died in 1396, in her hometown, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly est née en 1375, à Irlande, fille de Murtogh OKelly. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. Elle est décédée en 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly wurde 1375 in Irland, als Tochter von Murtogh OKelly geboren. Sie hatte mit Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1396 im Alter von 21 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly è nata il nel 1375 nel Irlanda come figlia di Murtogh OKelly. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. Morì nel 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kellyは1375年にアイルランドでMurtogh OKellyの娘として生まれた。彼女はLord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricardeとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1396年に故郷で21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly(은)는 1375년 아일랜드에서 Murtogh OKelly의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 그녀의 고향에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly nasceu em 1375, em Irlanda filha de Murtogh OKelly. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. Ela faleceu em 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly родилась в 1375 г. в местности Ирландия. Её отца звали Murtogh OKelly. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. Она умерла в 1396 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Fina MacWilliam Burke", "Fina MacWilliam O Kelly" Benomon Deburgh O Kelly nació en 1375, en Irlanda como hija de Murtogh OKelly. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Lord Ulick An Fhiona de Burke 3rd Of Clanricarde. Murió en 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 21 años.
